narrative:
Mansfield municipal court district has 66,919 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.2% D−R vs -16.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
